title: Lesson 24
paragraph: The previous owner of the old house left a traditional garden and a visible stone path. The room felt bright and cheerful, but the busy road outside made it noisy. A careful check found a deep crack in one wall. The kitchen was delicious-smelling after lunch, and the small room felt difficult to heat in winter. Still, the house had an early design and excellent windows.

words.meaning: happening or existing before now or before another thing
words.example: The previous lesson was easier than this one.
They wore traditional clothes for the festival.
The mountain is visible from our classroom.

words.meaning: full of light or strong in color
words.example: The bright room helped me wake up.

words.meaning: having a lot to do or full of activity
words.example: The station is busy every morning.

words.meaning: thinking about what you do so you avoid mistakes
words.example: Be careful when you carry hot soup.
Her cheerful greeting made everyone smile.

words.meaning: going far down or far in
words.example: The lake is too deep for children to swim in.

words.meaning: not easy to do or understand
words.example: This puzzle is difficult, but it is fun.
